description_long: This humanoid robot features a rounded, dome-shaped head with expressive, cartoon-like eyes and a cylindrical torso. Its body is primarily a worn, yellowish-beige color with patches of blue-green and visible weathering, suggesting heavy use in an urban environment. The robot has two articulated arms ending in mechanical, multi-fingered hands, and a single central wheel or caster for mobility. The torso displays vent-like grilles and panel lines, with bolts and seams visible throughout the structure. The surface is matte and slightly rough, with areas of rust and grime adding to its utilitarian appearance. The overall design is functional yet friendly, with a compact, approachable form factor.
description: A compact, weathered humanoid robot with a rounded head, expressive eyes, articulated arms, and a single wheel for movement. Its body is mostly yellow-beige with blue-green patches and visible signs of wear.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the robot's expressive eyes, vented torso, and both articulated arms extended outward.
description_view_1: Rear-left view highlighting the dome-shaped head, blue-green side panel, and the back of the left arm.
description_view_2: Rear-right view focusing on the smooth, rounded back, blue-green panel, and the right arm extended outward.
description_view_3: Front-right view displaying the robot's face, right arm, and the vented front torso with visible hand details.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with both arms extended outward at shoulder height, hands open and fingers slightly spread, head facing forward, and body balanced on a single central wheel.
attribute_clothing_style: No visible clothing; the robot is covered in integrated metal and plastic panels with painted and weathered surfaces.
attribute_facial_features: The face features two large, expressive, cartoon-like eyes with dark pupils and raised eyebrows; no visible mouth or nose; the eyes are set into the dome-shaped head, giving a friendly appearance.
attribute_limb_articulation: Each arm has at least two visible joints (shoulder and elbow) with rotary articulation, and the hands have multiple articulated fingers; the central wheel acts as a single-point leg for movement.
attribute_presence_of_sensors: Visible optical sensors in the form of two large eyes on the head; no other sensors are clearly visible.
